# Announcement Post (Copy-Paste Ready)

---

**👋 Welcome to the DSA Handbook Community!**

Hello everyone!

This repository powers the **[DSA Handbook](https://aryagorjipour.github.io/dsa)** — a comprehensive, practical guide to Data Structures and Algorithms with complete implementations in **C#** and **Go**.

### What you'll find here
- Deep explanations with real-world context
- Canonical problems that show *why* each structure/algorithm exists
- Full, runnable code examples
- A companion project called [Structura](https://aryagorjipour.github.io/structura/) (an interactive RPG-style way to master these topics)

### How to use GitHub Discussions

We've set up these categories to keep the space organized and useful:

| Category              | Purpose |
|-----------------------|---------|
| **Announcements**     | Official updates from the maintainers (pinned) |
| **Q&A**               | Ask questions or get help with any topic or code |
| **Ideas & Feedback**  | Suggest new content, improvements, or features |
| **Show & Tell**       | Share your implementations, learning progress, or projects |
| **Resources**         | Share great external articles, videos, tools, or papers |
| **General**           | Anything else related to learning DSA |

### Get Started
- 📖 Read the handbook: https://aryagorjipour.github.io/dsa
- 💻 Browse the source: https://github.com/Aryagorjipour/dsa
- 🎮 Try the interactive companion: https://aryagorjipour.github.io/structura/

We're building one of the best free, open resources for mastering Data Structures & Algorithms. Questions, ideas, and contributions are all very welcome!

Happy learning!

— @Aryagorjipour

---

**Instructions for repo owner:**
1. Go to the repo → **Discussions** tab
2. Create the categories listed above (if not already created)
3. Post the text above as a new discussion in the **Announcements** category
4. Pin the post
5. (Optional) Set it as the repository's welcome message

This announcement helps surface the project and clearly explains the purpose of each category to new visitors.
